final_chunks.section_title: BEARISH FVG ANNOTATIONS AND TRADE ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
BEARISH FVG ANNOTATIONS AND TRADE ENTRY
The range between Candle 1's low and Candle 3's high is the FVG. Easiest Entry: A limit order just above Candle 3's high (e. g. , one tick above). Stop Loss: Above Candle 1 or above Candle 2.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json
